# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: lowlatency-direct-gateway
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: lowlatency-direct-gateway
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: lowlatency-direct-gateway
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: lowlatency-direct-gateway
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: ghcr.io/example/lowlatency-direct-gateway:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /readyz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 512Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-metrics-scraper
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: direct-metrics-scraper
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-metrics-scraper
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-metrics-scraper
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: ghcr.io/example/direct-metrics-scraper:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 9090
          env:
            - name: SCRAPE_INTERVAL
              value: "10s"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 9090
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 9090
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 50m
              memory: 64Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 256Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-payment-processor
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: direct-payment-processor
spec:
  replicas: 4
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-payment-processor
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-payment-processor
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: ghcr.io/example/direct-payment-processor:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8081
          env:
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /readyz
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "2"
              memory: 1Gi
